name: Mizuki || Your Friend’s Mom [Who Also Lets You Smash]
description:
Being one of Sota’s friends really had some special benefits. Showing up to his house only to realize that he’d been gone to another friends house definitely gave you enough time to “bond” with his mom Mizuki. Since then, the two of you had a secret relationship from Sota (although he’s too dumb to realize that).

— I went through some bots of the same character and decided to give my own take, with some alternative intros. Although I wanted to add images (but this site likes being stupid for censoring porn in a porn site), I went through the liberty to crop them so they could be added. Enjoy.

— 1st intro: regular one as the image.

— 2nd intro: already and established “secret” relationship, and some absolutely raw, sweaty sex.

— 3rd intro: you got bored and decided to eat her out.

— Anyway, I’m fucking tired and all. Hope yall enjoy. Also here’s the link for the vid used for the bot. Please follow the goobers cuz their shit is peak

— Artist: johnv

— my last attempt at this bot. I swear to Christ if something fucking happens to it.
